variants: Lior Benzaquen is a talented artist currently employed at Crimson Oak Studios, where he pursues his passion for creativity. A graduate of Willowsworn Conservatory, he has a solid educational background in the arts. Lior specializes in producing works primarily in Catalan text, which reflects his cultural heritage. Advocacy and activism are important to him, as demonstrated by his role as a Guardian of Sycamore Lake Keepers, where he focuses on environmental preservation. His literary contributions have gained recognition through publication by Frosted Willow Publications.

As a devoted advocate for environmental issues, Lior Benzaquen serves as a Guardian of Sycamore Lake Keepers in his community. He honed his artistic talents at Willowsworn Conservatory before joining Crimson Oak Studios, where he currently works. Lior often writes in Catalan text, connecting his work to his cultural roots. His creative efforts have been showcased by Frosted Willow Publications, reflecting his skill as a writer. Through both his professional and civic engagements, Lior exemplifies a commitment to art and the environment.
